label: Qualifying
description: Collecting missing fields and confirming consent/scope

label: Qualified
description: Minimum qualification and consent checks passed

label: Routing
description: Eligible partner selection and dispatch in progress

label: Appointment requested
description: Appointment window requested but not confirmed

label: Closed won
description: Referral/job outcome successful or billable by definition

label: Closed lost
description: Homeowner canceled chose another option or no fit

label: Invalid
description: Does not meet qualified opportunity definition

label: Duplicate
description: Duplicate of an existing active request

label: Do not contact
description: Consumer opted out or requested no further contact

label: Prospect
description: Potential provider not yet contacted or qualified

label: Emergency/safety
description: Immediate safety hazard; route to emergency guidance where appropriate

label: Normal 7d
description: Needs help within about a week

label: Revoked
description: STOP or other reasonable revocation received

label: Expired
description: Consent no longer valid by policy

label: Unknown
description: Consent missing or unclear; do not send outbound automation

label: Error
description: Technical or policy failure during routing
